message:
fix(contention): address clippy cast_sign_loss in threshold calculation

Replace direct `as f64` cast of u64 with `f64::from(base_contentions as
u32)` to avoid potential sign-loss warning, and add explicit
`#[allow(clippy::cast_sign_loss)]` for the ceil-to-u64 conversion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
